clients.name: Meridian Health Group
clients.notes: Private hospital group, 3 facilities. Perennial nursing shortages; fast interview turnaround.

clients.name: Equinox DC Operations Pte Ltd
clients.notes: Operates 2 colocation facilities, expanding to a third in Tuas by Q1 2027. Needs critical facilities engineers ahead of commissioning.

clients.name: Veritas AI Labs
clients.notes: Series B applied-AI startup, ~80 headcount. Hiring ML engineers and data engineers; picky on production experience.

clients.name: St. Gabriel Community Hospital
clients.notes: Community hospital, 280 beds. First conversation held June 2026; interested in allied health pipeline.

jobs.title: Senior Staff Nurse (Medical-Surgical Ward)
jobs.description: Senior Staff Nurse for a 40-bed medical-surgical ward. Registered Nurse with valid SNB registration required. Minimum 4 years of acute care experience. BCLS certification mandatory, ACLS preferred. Degree or Diploma in Nursing. Must be comfortable with preceptorship of junior nurses and use of Epic EMR. Singapore Citizens and PRs preferred.

jobs.title: Critical Facilities Engineer (Data Centre)
jobs.description: Critical Facilities Engineer to oversee electrical and mechanical infrastructure in a Tier III colocation facility. Minimum 5 years of data centre or critical environment experience. Strong knowledge of UPS systems, generators, chillers, CRAC units and BMS. Degree in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering. CDCP or equivalent data centre certification preferred. 12-hour rotating shifts.

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer
jobs.description: Machine Learning Engineer to productionise NLP models. Minimum 3 years of ML engineering experience. Strong Python, PyTorch or TensorFlow, and experience deploying models with Docker and Kubernetes. Degree in Computer Science or related field, Master's preferred. Experience with LLM fine-tuning and vector databases is a plus. Hybrid work arrangement.

candidates.name: Nurul Aisyah Binte Rahman
candidates.title: Senior Staff Nurse
candidates.summary: Seven years of acute medical-surgical nursing across public and private hospitals. Currently precepting a team of four junior nurses. Looking for a senior role with clearer progression toward Nurse Clinician.

points: Lead nurse for a 38-bed med-surg ward on rotating shifts
Preceptor for 4 junior nurses and 6 student placements per year
Ward champion for Epic EMR rollout in 2023
General surgical ward, 28 beds
Trained in post-operative wound management and IV therapy

candidates.name: Grace Tan Wei Ling
candidates.title: Staff Nurse
candidates.summary: Four years in medical and geriatric wards. Recently completed a contract role and available immediately. Keen to move into a private hospital setting.

points: Geriatric medicine ward, high-dependency bays
Falls-prevention committee member
Sub-acute care and rehabilitation nursing

candidates.name: Joseph Mendoza
candidates.title: Registered Nurse (ICU)
candidates.education: Bachelor of Science in Nursing, University of Santo Tomas
candidates.summary: Nine years of ICU nursing, the last five in Singapore. Deep experience with ventilated patients and CRRT. Seeking a senior ICU or high-dependency role.

points: 12-bed surgical ICU, 1:1 and 1:2 nursing
CRRT-trained; ECMO exposure
Medical-surgical ICU, charge nurse on night shifts from 2019

candidates.name: Cheryl Ong Hui Min
candidates.title: Radiographer
candidates.summary: Five years across general X-ray and CT. Rotating on-call experience. Interested in a CT-focused role with structured MRI cross-training.

points: General radiography and CT rotations, including trauma on-call
Departmental PACS super-user

candidates.name: Muhammad Hafiz Bin Ismail
candidates.title: Critical Facilities Engineer
candidates.summary: Eight years in critical facilities across two Tier III colocation sites. Led the electrical commissioning workstream for a 20MW hall in 2024. Comfortable with 12-hour rotating shifts.

points: Shift lead for a Tier III facility, 4-person team
Owned UPS and generator maintenance programme; zero unplanned downtime in 2025
Electrical commissioning lead for 20MW expansion
M&E operations, BMS monitoring, vendor management

candidates.name: Ravi Chandran
candidates.title: Data Centre Technician
candidates.education: Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Singapore Polytechnic
candidates.summary: Four years in data centre operations, covering M&E rounds, BMS alarms and remote-hands work. Studying part-time toward a degree. Available immediately.

points: Daily M&E readings and BMS alarm response for two data halls
Remote hands: rack & stack, structured cabling, tape rotation

candidates.name: Daniel Koh Jun Wei
candidates.title: Data Centre Operations Manager
candidates.summary: Twelve years across data centre M&E and operations leadership. Currently managing a 30-person operations team across two sites. Open to a regional or commissioning-heavy role.

points: Manages 30 engineers and technicians across 2 IBX sites
Owns uptime SLAs, incident management and client audits
Chiller plant and UPS upgrades while live
Built the site's preventive maintenance regime

candidates.name: Wei Zhang
candidates.title: Machine Learning Engineer
candidates.summary: Five years building and shipping NLP systems. Fine-tuned and deployed LLM-based document extraction serving 2M requests per month. Strong production engineering habits.

points: Built LLM-based support-ticket triage, cutting handle time 30%
Owns model serving on Kubernetes with canary rollouts
Document extraction pipeline with transformer models
Moved team from notebooks to CI-tested training pipelines

candidates.name: Arjun Nair
candidates.title: Data Engineer
candidates.summary: Six years of data platform work. Built streaming and batch pipelines feeding ML teams. Wants a role closer to the ML platform side.

points: Kafka + Spark streaming pipelines at ~1B events/day
Led migration to dbt + Snowflake for analytics workloads
Airflow orchestration for network analytics

candidates.name: Sarah Goh Li Ting
candidates.title: Data Scientist
candidates.summary: Four years in product analytics and applied ML. Strong on experimentation and stakeholder communication; lighter on deployment. Exploring ML-adjacent roles.

points: Search-ranking experiments and demand forecasting
Partner data scientist for two product squads

candidates.name: Amirah Binte Yusof
candidates.title: Staff Nurse
candidates.summary: Six years in acute care with a two-year oncology rotation. Chemo-competent. Looking for a senior staff nurse post with oncology exposure.

points: Med-surg and oncology wards; chemotherapy administration competent
Epic EMR super-user for the ward

candidates.title: DevOps Engineer

candidates.summary: Five years split between acute and community rehabilitation. Strong geriatric caseload experience; comfortable with home-visit programmes.

candidates.name: Tomasz Kowalski
candidates.title: Electrical Engineer (Critical Environments)
candidates.education: MSc Electrical Engineering, Warsaw University of Technology
candidates.summary: Ten years in critical power, the last four in APAC data centre commissioning. Has led Level 4/5 commissioning for hyperscale builds. Open for the right senior IC or lead role.

points: L4/L5 commissioning lead on two hyperscale campuses in SEA
Client-side witness testing for UPS, generators, switchgear
UPS deployment and service across EMEA enterprise sites

activities.text: Nurul Aisyah — panel interview with Dr. Colin Teo at Meridian Health. Feedback due Monday.
Submitted Hafiz Ismail to Equinox DC for Critical Facilities Engineer.
Priya (Veritas AI) confirmed budget up to $12k for ML Engineer; wants production LLM experience.
Added Joseph Mendoza (ICU RN, 9 yrs) via referral from placed candidate.
